title: Roasted Portuguese Flaxseed Skewers
description: Charred and pillowy, these post-workout Portuguese flaxseed skewers are a delicious and healthy snack, featuring flaxseed as the main ingredient, roasted to perfection on a cedar plank.
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Soak the cedar planks in water for 30 minutes before cooking.
In a large bowl, mix together the ground flaxseed, portuguese spice blend, olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Thread the flaxseed mixture onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Place the skewers on the soaked cedar planks.
Roast the skewers in the air fryer for 10-12 minutes, or until charred and pillowy.
Flip the skewers halfway through cooking to ensure even cooking.
Remove the skewers from the air fryer and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the roasted flaxseed skewers hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
